scope.branch: feature/m3-1-project-registration-slice-1 (fast-forwarded into main; deleted per the branching strategy rule 7)
in_scope: Project domain entity at src/AiEng.Platform.Domain/Projects/Project.cs (immutable Id, Name, Path, CreatedAt; mutable LastUsedAt?).
IProjectStore + InMemoryProjectStore at src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Projects/ (the persistence seam and the M3 smoke-test in-memory store; ConcurrentDictionary<Guid, Project>; not durable).

IProjectService + ProjectService at src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Projects/ (the application-layer facade: RegisterAsync, ListAsync, GetAsync, RenameAsync, UnregisterAsync; all write methods return Result<Project>).

Result<T> + ValidationError at src/AiEng.Platform.Application/Projects/Result.cs (the unified Result envelope; ValidationError as a sealed class with private constructor and factory methods Required, InvalidPath, NotFound).

ProjectsServiceCollectionExtensions.AddProjects at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/Projects/ (registers IProjectStore as InMemoryProjectStore singleton; IProjectService as ProjectService singleton).

AppProjectCard + AppProjectCard.razor.css at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/ (presentational card; renders the Project parameter; status badge New/Active; three action buttons all disabled in M3.1).

AppProjectList + AppProjectList.razor.css at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Projects/ (data-owning list with the four state slots: Loading, Empty, Error, Populated; injects IProjectService through the contract).

/projects page at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Components/Pages/Projects.razor + scoped CSS (composes AppPageHeader + AppBreadcrumb + AppProjectList; [RouteMetadata] with Href=/projects, Order=1, ShowInSidebar=true, Icon=▢).
AddPlatformServices wires AddProjects at src/AiEng.Platform.App/Composition/ServiceCollectionExtensions.cs.

Architecture test Pages_Resolve_Projects_Through_Service at tests/AiEng.Platform.ArchitectureTests/Pages/ (asserts the /projects page and AppProjectList consume IProjectService through the contract, not through InMemoryProjectStore or the file system directly).
Unit tests: IProjectServiceTests (16), InMemoryProjectStoreTests (11).
bUnit tests: AppProjectCardTests (5), AppProjectListTests (4), ProjectsPageTests (4).

last_action.outcome: M3.1 is delivered 2026-07-11. The M3 surface lands end-to-end as a single slice: the contract (IProjectStore, IProjectService), the in-memory store (InMemoryProjectStore; the M3 smoke test for the contract; M4-A swaps the IProjectStore registration in AddProjects), the domain entity (Project), the composition root (AddProjects), the UI surface (AppProjectCard, AppProjectList, /projects page), the architecture test (Pages_Resolve_Projects_Through_Service enforces the single-seam rule), 27 new unit tests + 13 new bUnit tests + 2 new architecture tests. The M3.1 implementation report is at implementation-report-m3-1-project-registration-slice-1.md. The M3.1 per-session handoff is at .ai/handoffs/2026-07-11-m3-1-project-registration-slice-1.md (mirrored to latest.md). The M3.2 plan is at .ai/plans/M3.2-project-registration-slice-2.md (Status: Awaiting Approval). T-019 (M3.2) is Ready in tasks.json. The M3.1 closeout commit is on main; the M3.1 feature branch is fast-forwarded into main per the branching strategy rule 6; the branch is deleted per rule 7. Validation results: 240 passed, 0 failed, 7 skipped (per ADR-016); 0 warnings, 0 errors; format clean; visual smoke green. No push (not authorised).

intended_next_action: Stop. The next session is the M3.2 plan approval and M3.2 implementation. The M3.2 plan is in Awaiting Approval; T-019 (M3.2) is in Ready. Do NOT begin M3.2 implementation in this session.
session_notes: M3.1 implementation session (2026-07-11). The user's brief was to (1) reconcile Git, structured state, the roadmap, the task board, the latest handoff, and the M3 milestone; (2) confirm T-018 (M3.1) is the first dependency-satisfied Ready task; (3) promote the M3 plan from Awaiting Approval to Approved; (4) implement M3.1 within planned scope; (5) close M3.1; (6) not begin M3.2 implementation. The session executes the brief in the order: (a) reconcile state with the repository; (b) promote the M3 plan to Approved implicitly (per the brief, the M3 plan promotion is implicit; the M3.1 slice is the first M3 implementation slice); (c) implement M3.1: Project domain entity; IProjectStore + InMemoryProjectStore; IProjectService + ProjectService; Result + ValidationError; AddProjects composition root; AppProjectCard + AppProjectList; /projects page; the architecture test Pages_Resolve_Projects_Through_Service; the unit + bUnit test coverage; docs/projects.md; (d) validate the M3.1 slice end-to-end (6 gates: css:build, restore, build, test, format, visual smoke — all green; 240 passed, 0 failed, 7 skipped); (e) update the project-continuity state per Rule 15 (session.json, tasks.json, current.md, task-board.md, milestones.json, ROADMAP.md, master-delivery-plan.md, handoffs/latest.md); (f) write the M3.1 implementation report at implementation-report-m3-1-project-registration-slice-1.md; (g) write the M3.1 per-session handoff at .ai/handoffs/2026-07-11-m3-1-project-registration-slice-1.md (mirrored to latest.md); (h) promote M3.2 to Ready: create the M3.2 plan at .ai/plans/M3.2-project-registration-slice-2.md (Status: Awaiting Approval); T-019 (M3.2) in tasks.json; (i) create the single coherent commit on the feature branch (feat(m3.1): add project registration surface); (j) fast-forward the feature branch into main per the branching strategy rule 6; (k) delete the feature branch per rule 7; (l) stop. Push is skipped (no push in this session; the user controls pushes per the command protocol). Three documented deviations: (1) ValidationError is a class, not a struct (T? semantics on the Result<T>.Error slot forced the change); (2) IClock is realised through .NET 8+ TimeProvider; (3) Disabled tests unchanged.
